title: tocoyena brevifolia
intro: Tocoyena brevifolia, also known as the Forest Tocoyena, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tocoyena brevifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Tocoyena brevifolia is often used as a decoction or infusion, typically prepared by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
